description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a crustacean, likely a shrimp or prawn, with an elongated, slender body and long, thin appendages. The main body appears to be segmented, with a pronounced curve and a tapering tail. Several thin, stick-like legs extend from the underside, and a pair of long antennae project from the head region. The surface is smooth and hard, with a dark, almost black coloration and subtle highlights. The overall form is delicate and spindly, with minimal bulk and a lightweight appearance.
description: A slender, dark-colored crustacean with long legs and antennae, featuring a segmented, curved body and a smooth, hard surface.
description_view_0: This view highlights the junction of the body and appendages, showing the segmentation and the base of the antennae.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the length and thinness of the antennae, with minimal body detail visible.
description_view_2: This view shows the crossing of the legs and the linear structure of the appendages, with the body mostly out of frame.
description_view_3: This perspective captures the overall length and slenderness of the crustacean, with the body and appendages forming a sharp angle.
